goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 12:15'.
The train should go to 'stansted airport' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time', 'travel time', and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 12:15
The train should go to stansted airport and should leave on tuesday
Make sure you get departure time, travel time, and train ID
